languages.text: "Произошедшее не дает тебе право убивать моих людей. Подданых Бога-Императора, проливающих за Человечество кровь — как и ты!"
"What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"
languages.original_text: "Произошедшее не дает тебе право убивать моих людей. Подданых Бога-Императора, проливающих за Человечество кровь — как и ты!"

traits.locale_text: "What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"
"What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"
"What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"

languages.text: 「何が起きたとしても、君たちは私の民を殺す権利はない。彼らは神皇帝の臣民であり、人類のために血を流すのだ。君たちと同じように！」
languages.original_text: "What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"

traits.locale_text: 「何が起きたとしても、君たちは私の民を殺す権利はない。彼らは神皇帝の臣民であり、人類のために血を流すのだ。君たちと同じように！」

languages.text: "Olanlar sana adamlarımı öldürme hakkı vermez. Onlar da tıpkı senin gibi Tanrı İmparator'un emrindeki, İnsanlık için kan döken tebaadan ibaret!"
languages.original_text: "What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"

traits.locale_text: "Olanlar sana adamlarımı öldürme hakkı vermez. Onlar da tıpkı senin gibi Tanrı İmparator'un emrindeki, İnsanlık için kan döken tebaadan ibaret!"

languages.text: «Lo que pasó no le da derecho a matar a mi gente. ¡Son súbditos del Dios Emperador que sangran por la Humanidad, igual que usted!».
languages.original_text: "What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"

traits.locale_text: «Lo que pasó no le da derecho a matar a mi gente. ¡Son súbditos del Dios Emperador que sangran por la Humanidad, igual que usted!».

languages.text: “无论发生了什么，你都无权杀我的人。他们和你一样，都是为人类流血牺牲的神皇子民！”
languages.original_text: "What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"

traits.locale_text: “无论发生了什么，你都无权杀我的人。他们和你一样，都是为人类流血牺牲的神皇子民！”

languages.text: « Ce qui s'est passé ne vous donne pas le droit de tuer les membres de mon équipage. Ce sont des sujets de l'Empereur-Dieu qui versent leur sang pour l'humanité, tout comme vous ! »
languages.original_text: "What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"

traits.locale_text: « Ce qui s'est passé ne vous donne pas le droit de tuer les membres de mon équipage. Ce sont des sujets de l'Empereur-Dieu qui versent leur sang pour l'humanité, tout comme vous ! »

languages.text: "Was geschehen ist, gibt Euch nicht das Recht, meine Leute zu töten. Sie sind Untertanen des Gottimperators, die für die Menschheit bluten – genau wie Ihr!"
languages.original_text: "What happened does not give you the right to kill my people. They are subjects of the God-Emperor, who bleed for Humanity — just like you!"

traits.locale_text: "Was geschehen ist, gibt Euch nicht das Recht, meine Leute zu töten. Sie sind Untertanen des Gottimperators, die für die Menschheit bluten – genau wie Ihr!"
